title: Non-cancerous (benign) brain tumours - NHS
text:
rt@thebraintumourcharity.org The Brain Tumour Charity: online support groups The Brain Tumour Charity: local support groups The Brain Tumour Charity: order a free information pack Brainstrust Information and support for anyone affected by brain cancer and brain tumours.
Website: brainstrust.org.uk Helpline: 01983 292 405 Email: hello@brainstrust.org.uk Brainstrust: meet others with a brain tumour Brainstrust: help, support and information for brain tumour carers Little Brainstrust: information and support for children with brain tumours Headway Information and support for anyone affected by brain injuries, including brain tumours.
Website: www.headway.org.uk Helpline: 0808 800 2244 Email: helpline@headway.org.uk Headway: support in your area
